1.name: Spine/Cover
1.description: Spine and cover of the as-built documentation. Documents containing basic information such as property name, project name, and creation date.

2.name: Table of Contents/Index
2.description: Table of contents, index, and list of handover documents for the as-built documentation. Documents defining the overall structure and item list.

3.name: Equipment Handover List
3.description: List and receipt of equipment sets (keys, spare parts, manuals, etc.) handed over to the customer.

4.name: Construction Completion Report
4.description: Construction completion notice, handover document, and completion report. Documents proving project completion and handover.

5.name: Construction Schedule
5.description: Schedule showing project planning and actual results. Records of start date, completion date, and progress of each phase.

6.name: As-built/Construction Drawings
6.description: Set of drawings accurately showing the status at construction completion, including site plans, layout plans, single-line diagrams, string diagrams, and equipment layouts.

7.name: Test Reports/Inspection Sheets
7.description: Successful pass documents recording test results such as equipment operation tests, insulation resistance measurements, and grounding resistance measurements.

8.name: Self-Inspection Sheets
8.description: Records of as-built inspections and internal inspections by the contractor. Includes self-inspection check sheets and reports of corrective actions.

10.name: Equipment Configuration/List
10.description: Documents listing major equipment (modules, PCS, monitoring devices, etc.) with manufacturers, models, specs, and quantities.

11.name: PCS/Power Conditioners
11.description: Individual specifications, test reports, delivery notes, and approval drawings related to Power Conditioning Systems (PCS).

12.name: Modules
12.description: Specifications, flash reports (inspection reports), delivery notes, and serial number lists related to solar battery modules.

13.name: Monitoring/Communication Devices
13.description: Specifications, test reports, account settings, and connection diagrams for SmartLoggers, gateways, routers, etc.

14.name: Equipment Specs
14.description: Catalogs and specifications for other equipment (distribution boards, mounting structures, fittings, measuring instruments, etc.) delivered to the project.

15.name: User/Operation Manuals
15.description: Operation manuals, quick start guides, and procedures for emergency operation or system recovery.

16.name: Administrative Documents
16.description: Applications, notifications, and approval documents for government agencies (METI safety regulations, self-confirmation results, etc.), fire departments, and local governments.

17.name: Utility Documents/Responses
17.description: Grid connection studies, application forms, construction fees, utility contract notices, response letters, and setting lists for electric power companies.

18.name: Warranties
18.description: Manufacturer warranties, system warranties, and quality assurance regulations for major equipment and construction work.

19.name: Construction Photos/Album
19.description: Photos recording the construction process, completion of each phase, equipment installation status, fixed-point observations, meter serial numbers, etc.

20.name: Strength Calculation Documents
20.description: Structural strength study reports for mounting structures and fittings (wind pressure, snow load, soil bearing capacity, etc.). Supporting documents for administrative filings.

22.name: Other/Manifests
22.description: Industrial waste management forms (manifests), calibration certificates (pyranometers, thermometers), chief technician information, and other miscellaneous documents.
